g.text: AI Data Analysis Agent — System Architecture
Small file (<40MB): ① parse_file → schema ② execute (clean+pickle) ③ execute (analysis+PDF) ④ download_file
Large file (≥40MB): ① parse_file → ⚠️DuckDB ② execute (Excel→CSV) ③ execute (DuckDB+PDF) ④ download_file
Multi-sheet: same cols → UNION ALL | related → JOIN | independent → separate queries
🔵 UI Layer (Streamlit) 🟢 Skill System (Prompt Composition) 🟣 Agent Core (LangChain + LangGraph) 🟠 Tools (5 explicit) 🔴 ArtifactStore (thread bridge) 🔷 Daytona Sandbox
